reviews.comment:
No merecen estrellas. Es ACA , es YPF , es el Camino màs caro de la Argentina, y no atienden YPF en ruta por comodidad.  Soy socio de la ACA !

(Translated by Google)
They don't deserve stars. It's ACA, it's YPF, it's the most expensive road in Argentina, and they don't service YPF on the roadside for convenience. I'm an ACA member!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBckotRFVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cierran una de las dos únicas islas que tienen, un sábado a la mañana, hacia panamericana, por economizar personal y a esperar que te atiendan haciendo cola al sol con 35*C, una vergüenza, abusan de posición dominante por ser la única estación de servicios en la autopista más cara del país y de varios países...

(Translated by Google)
They close one of their only two islands on a Saturday morning, heading towards the Pan-American Highway, to save on staff, forcing you to wait in line in the 35°C sun. It's a disgrace. They abuse their dominant position as the only service station on the most expensive highway in the country, and in several other countries...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRNzZTemZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
No tienen mini mercado , YPF en ruta funciona de un lado solo. Una vergüenza que muchas veces no te atiendan por falta de combustible. Para colmo es la autopista más cara de la Argentina
Esperando al sol, con una de las dos islas cerradas por falta de personal :(

(Translated by Google)
They don't have a convenience store, and the YPF station on the highway only operates on one side. It's a disgrace that they often can't serve you because they're out of fuel. To top it all off, it's the most expensive highway in Argentina. Waiting in the sun, with one of the two islands closed due to staff shortages :(
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6561338839586270574/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBLUlIdWRnEAE
